channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside St George’s House, 17th June
item.description:
There is an extremely pungent smell coming from the drain. It is going into people’s homes and is making people who are elderly and infirm feel physically sick. It’s just the one drain on the road that has this so maybe something is stuck and needs to be removed. The weather is getting hotter and the smell is getting worse. One lady has the smell permeating into her bedroom and she’s the sole carer for a very sick man. This has been reported before by many of the residents and nothing has been done to rectify the issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chalton Street, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter needs clearing, 17th June
item.description:
The grass area running alongside pavement, behind bus stop (opposite Johnson Rd) needs thorough litterpick please, ensure shrubs and bushes are also cleared. Please ensure this request is only marked as closed once the work has been completed. Issues are regularly closed before action has been taken, which leads to unnecessary re-reporting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive sink hole on parkers row se1, 17th June
item.description:
Sink hole on parkers row grounds. Very dangerous Health and safety issue. Has been there for 6 months despite reporting it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wade House, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste bin not collected, 17th June
item.description:
Our brown, green waste bin was not collected today as scheduled. This is the second time in three weeks. Other houses were missed too, some for the second week in a row.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grierson Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorbikes ignoring the ‘no motorbikes’ sign, 17th June
item.description:
There are cctv cameras here to stop motorbikes/scooters driving past the barrier and the sign. They seem to be ignoring them. Do the cameras work?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grierson Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really deep pot hole - unavoidable, 17th June
item.description:
This pothole is really deep and annoyingly unavoidable. As Thames water have closed off a road nearby, all traffic has been diverted this way so we have to drive over it and no matter how slow you go, it makes an awful thud and really ruins our tyres. Right near nursery
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Effra Parade, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inlet/outlet Pipe from Big pond into Small blocked, 17th June
item.description:
The inlet/outlet pipe is blocked between the large pond into small pond. It needs to be unblocked as water level in large pond is rising and overflowing onto the pathway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): River Park View, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motor bikes ignoring sign for ‘no motorbikes’, 17th June
item.description:
There are cctv cameras at this junction to stop motorbikes/scooters driving past the barrier. They seem to be ignoring them and the road signs. I wonder if the cameras are working?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Devonshire Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge looks Structurally Unsafe, 17th June
item.description:
There is a crack in the middle of the bridge, it looks like this could collapse if there was additional weight on the bridge. Just noticed today in standstill traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartford Bypass, Joydens Wood, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown base of Lime tree, 17th June
item.description:
This tree base is encroaching onto the pavement. Also causing difficulties when accessing elderly mans home. Awaiting occupational therapist assessment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside hotel, 17th June
item.description:
See photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, King Henry's Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 17th June
item.description:
A sofa has been dumped on the pavement by the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping furniture, 17th June
item.description:
Table, washing machine outer, plastic drum and rubbish been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stonefield Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Lights not working properly, 17th June
item.description:
The lights are staying on Red for ages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Treacle Mine Roundabout, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rochester Place - both sections, 17th June
item.description:
Several street lights along Rochester Place illuminated in middle of day. There was a momentary loss of power in the area at lunchtime.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Rochester Place, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on pavement, 17th June
item.description:
Mattress left on pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earlswood Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rochester Terrace, 17th June
item.description:
Several street lights along Rochester Terrace illuminated in middle of day. There was a momentary loss of power in the area at lunchtime.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Rochester Terrace, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This fly tipping has not been “fixed” as stated on the feedback report., 17th June
item.description:
I have repeatedly reported this corrugated material dumped on the path. Although it has been there for so long now, for at least 2 months, and has started to break up into pieces, it has not been removed or “fixed” as the feed back on the report states. Please amend the outcome as this is incorrect and remove these materials urgently? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge Dumped, 17th June
item.description:
Large fridge left on pavement for over 3 weeks now.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge fridge freezer, 17th June
item.description:
Huge fridge freezer blocking pavement an park in g bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Haven Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
